title: AdvancedBanPunishAddon
description: AdvancedBanPunishAddon - Simple and clean addon for AdvancedBan!
body:
AdvancedBanPunishAddon – The Ultimate AdvancedBan Addon!

AdvancedBanPunishAddon is a lightweight, easy-to-use plugin designed to extend the power of AdvancedBan. 
It makes punishing players faster, cleaner, and more intuitive for server staff, without any extra hassle.

🌟 **Features**:
- **/punish command**: Quickly punish players using a simple command
- **Four built-in reasons**: hacking/cheating, xray/baritone, racism, swearing/spamming
- **Tab completion**: Easily select online players and valid reasons
- **Permission system**: Use `advancedbanpunishaddon.punishuse` to restrict command usage
- **AdvancedBan detection**: Automatically checks if AdvancedBan is installed
- **Instant feedback**: Staff get confirmation messages in chat for every punishment
- **Fully compatible**: Works on Spigot and Paper 1.21+
- **Lightweight**: Minimal server impact and easy to configure

💡 **Why use AdvancedBanPunishAddon?**
- Saves time for staff by simplifying punishments
- Reduces errors by only allowing valid reasons
- Gives clear feedback so staff know actions are successful
- Clean, professional, and ready-to-use

🚀 **Get started**:
1. Install AdvancedBan on your server
2. Drop `AdvancedBanPunishAddon.jar` into your `/plugins` folder
3. Restart the server
4. Use `/punish <player> <reason>` to punish players instantly!

---

**Support & Updates**:
- Follow the plugin author `ItzSharkz_` for updates
- Report bugs or suggestions on the Modrinth/Spigot page
